headline: Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) Is Up 17.3% After Earnings Beat And Dividend Hike Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In recent days, Monolithic Power Systems reported stronger-than-expected Q4 2025 results, issued upbeat Q1 2026 guidance, raised its quarterly dividend, and benefited from a semiconductor rally as U.S.-Iran tensions eased and supply chain risks through the Strait of Hormuz subsided. At the same time, Executive Vice President Saria Tseng sold about US$8.90 million of stock under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan, while the company’s high GF Score and expanding role in AI and data-center power...

headline: A Look At Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) Valuation After Strong Results Dividend Hike And AI Demand Tailwinds
summary: Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) is back in focus after reporting strong Q4 2025 results, issuing upbeat Q1 2026 guidance, and lifting its quarterly dividend, all amid rising AI and semiconductor demand. See our latest analysis for Monolithic Power Systems. The strong Q4 update, higher dividend and upbeat Q1 2026 outlook have coincided with rapid share price moves, including a 10.22% 1 day share price return and a 40.22% year to date share price return. headline: Can Diversification Boost CRUS' Revenue Stability & Margin Profile?
summary: Cirrus Logic bets on diversification beyond smartphones, targeting PCs, automotive, and AI interfaces to reduce reliance on a single customer.

headline: Teradyne, Applied Materials, Monolithic Power Systems, Western Digital, and Semtech Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session as semiconductor stocks rallied in response to the de-escalation of the U.S.-Iran conflict.
